race.comment: MISS BOOM (8) is a former SA mare having first start this area. Speedy type who looks well placed this line-up. Should take catching off the low draw. EVEN SHARPER (1) has placed at both runs this time in, the latest over 1200m here again on Saturday and on the quick back-up. Looks a top chance to find some winning form. REVOLUTION RISING (4) finished third last start this track and trip latest, beaten 1.5 lengths. Paul Denton gets the best out of this five-year-old gelding. Close to a win and looks sure to be in the finish. RISING FIRE (6) ran a better race last start, finishing 5 lengths away in fifth over 1400m at this track. Coming back in trip and will be winding up late. ONLY THE BEST (2) is also on the quick back-up after finishing eighth here on Saturday but should take catching off the inside gate.
